title: Special session of Parliament begins today. PM Modi to speak on Women's Reservation Bill – what to expect?
description: The Constitution (One Hundred and Thirty-First Amendment) Bill, 2026, along with the Delimitation Bill, 2026, will be introduced by Law Minister Arjun Ram Meghwal, while the Union Territories Laws (Amendment) Bill, 2026, will be tabled by Home Minister Amit Shah. PM Modi will address the house too
